title: Secure API Key Management with Client Support
essence: Server-side key management with optional client keys and comprehensive sanitization
steps: Prioritize server-side environment variables for API keys
Accept client keys as optional override with validation
Sanitize all keys in logging and error responses
Add key validation before API calls
tradeoffs: Reduced flexibility for client-side key management
Limited debugging visibility with masked keys
rollback: Skip key validation for faster development

evidence.notes: Security best practices implemented - prevents key exposure while maintaining functionality
